decisions.message: Mission Belt turn 1 Reverse Thrusters desync investigated: bridge MOVE_ATTACK ACKed Brute_KickBack but live state shows only the move applied and the attack effect no-oped. Treating Brute_KickBack like Control Shot for this run by using visible dispatch_click_action, and resetting the turn before continuing.
